question.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.

variants.text: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.

hints.hint:
After negative/restrictive adverbials (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom, Only then…), **subject-auxiliary inversion** is required.
The inverted auxiliary must match the tense of the original clause. Only the auxiliary comes before the subject.

Po przysłówkach o znaczeniu ograniczającym (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom…) wymagana jest inwersja podmiotu i operatora.
Inwertowany operator musi odpowiadać czasowi zdania. Tylko operator przechodzi przed podmiot.

«No sooner...than» — конструкція Past Perfect з інверсією: «No sooner had + підмет + Past Participle than...».
«Begun» — Past Participle дієслова «begin»; це ознака Past Perfect після «had».

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «did» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «did» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Did» + «begun» граматично некоректно: «begun» — Past Participle, що вимагає «had».

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Did» + «begun» граматично некоректно: «begun» — Past Participle, що вимагає «had».

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. «had» is the right form here based on the grammar rule for this sentence type.

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «had» jest właściwą formą zgodnie z regułą gramatyczną tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» — правильна інверсія Past Perfect: «No sooner had the concert begun than...».

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» — правильна інверсія Past Perfect: «No sooner had the concert begun than...».

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «has» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «has» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Has» — Present Perfect; «started raining» (Past Simple) вказує на минулий контекст Past Perfect.

chatgpt_explanations.question: No sooner {a1} the concert begun than it started raining.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Has» — Present Perfect; «started raining» (Past Simple) вказує на минулий контекст Past Perfect.
